# Requirements: [Feature Name]

## Functional Requirements

| ID | Requirement | Priority |
|----|-------------|----------|
| FR-1 | Description | Must |
| FR-2 | Description | Should |
| FR-3 | Description | Could |

## Non-Functional Requirements

| ID | Requirement | Target |
|----|-------------|--------|
| NFR-1 | Performance | e.g., < 2s response time |
| NFR-2 | Compatibility | e.g., macOS + Linux |
| NFR-3 | Security | e.g., no secrets in logs |

## Constraints
- Must work with Go 1.22+
- Must not add external dependencies unless justified
- Must maintain backward compatibility with existing config.json

## Acceptance Criteria
- [ ] Criterion 1
- [ ] Criterion 2
- [ ] All tests pass (`make test`)
- [ ] Documentation updated
